task: Advanced high-value task: Finite-Capacity Plant Schedule Numerical Sanity Audit. Scenario: a senior technical lead needs to decide whether to hold, release, retest, or redesign based only on supplied evidence for finite-capacity plant schedule. Embedded packet: Records: R1 duration_hours=51 due_day=82 machine_capacity_hours=8; R2 duration_hours=60 due_day=78 machine_capacity_hours=11; R3 duration_hours=46 due_day=93 machine_capacity_hours=7. Remediation options: O1 changes duration_hours by -12% cost=81500; O2 changes due_day by -18% cost=98300; O3 changes machine_capacity_hours by -25% cost=57700; max_budget=123600. Rules and constraints: minimize late jobs first then changeover; jobs cannot split across machines; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: evaluate whether the supplied remediation options are relevant, affordable, and sufficient to change the final decision. Deliver finite_capacity_3.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
